## UserRuntime.IUserLibraryRuntime.getMaterializedSession() method

Gets a materialized editing session from a persisted session. Returns cached session if already materialized, or materializes on demand.

**Signature:**

```typescript
getMaterializedSession(sessionId: SessionId): Result<AnyMaterializedSession>;
```
